product_updates.title: Copilot is ‘for entertainment purposes only,’ according to Microsoft’s terms of use
product_updates.content: AI skeptics aren’t the only ones warning users not to unthinkingly trust models’ outputs — that’s what the AI companies say themselves in their terms of service.

product_updates.title: Can orbital data centers help justify a massive valuation for SpaceX?
product_updates.content: On the latest episode of TechCrunch’s Equity podcast, we debated Elon Musk's vision for data centers in space.

product_updates.title: In Japan, the robot isn’t coming for your job; it’s filling the one nobody wants
product_updates.content: Driven by labor shortages, Japan is pushing physical AI from pilot projects into real-world deployment.
